title: FATHIYA Systemization and Learning Loops
summary: Systemization ensures every FATHIYA session ends with a clear artifact and a learning loop that feeds back into the knowledge base.
key_principles: Every session ends with a clear artifact — no open-ended conclusions.
Learning loops capture what worked, what failed, and what changed in understanding.
Artifacts are traceable: source → classification → processing → output → receipt.
Systemization prevents knowledge decay by converting ephemeral insights into persistent cards.
Feedback loops inform future session structure, tool selection, and execution patterns.
boundary: Systemization principles only. Does not trigger external feedback mechanisms.
